items.title: Increase Long Run Distance
items.description: Gradually increase your long run distance by 10% each week to build endurance for the half marathon.

items.title: Incorporate Speed Work
items.description: Add one speed workout per week, such as intervals or tempo runs, to improve your pace.

items.title: Cross-Training Sessions
items.description: Include cross-training activities like cycling or swimming to enhance overall fitness and reduce injury risk.

items.title: Rest and Recovery
items.description: Ensure you have at least one full rest day each week to allow your body to recover and adapt.

items.title: Nutrition Focus
items.description: Pay attention to your nutrition, focusing on carbohydrates for energy and protein for recovery.
